Notes for

Cloud Connection Setup

Connect to Google Sheets to enable multi-user access.

Use the same URL as in the Digital Requisition App (Settings) so dispatches and stock stay in sync.

Firebase is configured in firebase-config.js (same folder as this app). All users and devices use the same config. To change it, edit that file and redeploy.

Add/Edit Customer

Price History

Date Supplier Price Qty

Recommendation

Login

Sign in with your email and password. Role is set by your account.

Login requires Firebase. Configure firebase-config.js and reload.

Reset password

Set new password for this user.

Change password

Set your own password. Enter current password first.

Data Management

Import Data (CSV)

Paste data to import/update items. Format: Name,Unit,Price,Stock

Full Backup

Export or import the entire application state.

🕓 Version History

Last 10 snapshots — auto-saved every time data is synced to Firebase. Restore any version in one click.

Click Refresh to load versions...

Automated Email Backup

Full inventory JSON is sent every 3 days to Admin/Manager via your Cloud Script.

Danger Zone

This will erase all saved progress and reset the application to its original state. This cannot be undone.
